This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-m982-7q3h-r784. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
A vulnerability was determined in Open Babel up to 3.1.1. This affects the function PQSFormat::ReadMolecule of the file /src/formats/PQSformat.cpp. This manipulation causes null pointer dereference. The attack is restricted to local execution. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7x26-54jj-cvhr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T17:42:11Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7x26-54jj-cvhr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7x26-54jj-cvhr"}], "nvd_published_at": "2025-09-26T04:15:59Z", "published_at": "2025-09-26T06:30:49Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-11000", "https://github.com/openbabel/openbabel/issues/2826", "https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22318474/poc.zip", "https://vuldb.com/?ctiid.325928", "https://vuldb.com/?id.325928", "https://vuldb.com/?submit.654066", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7x26-54jj-cvhr"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Open Babel has out-of-bounds read in PQS lowerit (pre-buffer read)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T17:42:12Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7x26-54jj-cvhr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "openbabel"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-01T17:42:11Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: Open Babel has out-of-bounds read in PQS lowerit (pre-buffer read)
